caption: A man wearing glasses, a white collared shirt, and a black traditional vest with red embroidery stands behind a microphone, speaking or singing. He is positioned in front of a backdrop of brown slatted panels. In the foreground, several people are seated with their backs to the camera, including individuals with blonde and brown hair, some wearing purple garments. A white box with the black text "ORCA" is visible on the right side of the scene. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in the same position, though his facial expressions and mouth movements change slightly as he speaks. The audience remains still, and the overall composition and lighting of the indoor setting remain consistent across the frames.
